title: agent-shell 0.63 updates

content_html:
July 22, 2026

It's been a little over a month since the 0.55 update, but plenty has landed since. Let's go through the highlights as of v0.63.

What's agent-shell?

agent-shell is a native Emacs mode to interact with AI agents powered by ACP (Agent Client Protocol).

Supported agents

The roster continues to grow.

This time we get two new agents supported:

  • Oh My Pi (omp), #631 by @tychoish.
  • Grok Build (xAI), #720 by @eddof13.

Additionally:

  • Claude regains rendering thinking output, since its ACP server started omitting by default.
  • Cursor now runs on the official Cursor CLI (agent acp). Note a recent CLI is required, as the acp subcommand was only added in 2026.
  • Codex now uses @agentclientprotocol/codex-acp.
  • Cline now accepts a default model and session mode via defcustoms (#693 by @nhojb).
  • Goose no longer requires an OpenAI key by default (#711 by @hoyon).
  • Qwen now has explicit support for OpenAI-compatible keys.

Preferred agent

agent-shell-preferred-agent-config gained finer control over agent selection. Set to an agent identifier to skip the picker entirely, or wrap it to keep the picker with a preselected default:

  • (setq agent-shell-preferred-agent-config 'claude-code) always starts Claude, no prompt.
  • (setq agent-shell-preferred-agent-config '(preselect . claude-code)) keeps the picker but preselects Claude as the default.

Custom markdown renderers

The new markdown renderer introduced in 0.55 is now extensible. Third-party packages can claim and render specific markdown constructs (source blocks, inline code ranges, etc) through agent-shell-markdown-render-functions.

Thanks to Andrea Alberti for driving the first integration in agent-shell-math-renderer, which renders LaTeX math equations as SVGs.

agent-shell faces

If you've wanted more theming control over agent-shell buffers, this is now possible via agent-shell-faces.el. Additionally, check out agent-shell-markdown.el for Markdown theming.

Less chatter, more grouping

If your agent session requires lots of tool use (fairly typical), you may notice that shell output is fairly verbose or chatty. This can be quite distracting, so from now on, tool usage as well as thinking are grouped together under an "Activity" section (collapsed by default). If you're a fan of the chatty output, not to worry. Use agent-shell-activity-group-expand-by-default to expand the lot by default.

The new "Activity" section has customisable headers (via agent-shell-activity-group-header-label-function). You now have three ways of rendering the activity header:

Descriptive

Collapsed

Expanded

(setq agent-shell-activity-group-header-label-function
      #'agent-shell-activity-group-descriptive-label)

Count

Collapsed

Expanded

(setq agent-shell-activity-group-header-label-function
      #'agent-shell-activity-group-count-label)

Tally

Collapsed

Expanded

(setq agent-shell-activity-group-header-label-function
      #'agent-shell-activity-group-tally-label)

Inline image and rich content rendering

agent-shell can now render agent-supplied image content inline, whether base64-encoded, a remote URL, or a resource_link/resource content block (#676 by @melito). Audio and other binary resources now render as links that can open externally.

Per-agent MCP servers

You can now attach MCP servers per agent kind through its config using the :mcp-servers field, as requested in #593.

Diff improvements

Section titles now summarize lines added and removed.

In addition, pressing RET in a diff buffer jumps to the file location where the change would apply, while multi-diff permission requests are now supported.

Improved out-of-turn handling

Some agents emit notifications outside of the usual prompt session request/response turn. Historically, these have been dropped by agent-shell. These out-of-turn notifications should now render as expected. Please file a bug if you continue to run into issues.

New copy commands

A few new commands for grabbing hidden content out of the shell buffer:

  • M-x agent-shell-copy-as-markdown copies buffer text as markdown.
  • M-x agent-shell-copy-source-block-at-point copies the source block at point.
  • M-x agent-shell-copy-link-url-at-point copies the URL of the link at point.

Viewport tweaks

The viewport picked up a few refinements:

  • agent-shell-viewport-dismiss-on-send dismisses the viewport once you send.
  • Submitting prompts via C-u C-c C-c now enables you to continue queuing additional requests.
  • History navigation now preserves your in-progress prompt.

Session choices

The new agent-shell-session-choices-function lets you customize what options are presented when starting a new shell. This is useful if you'd like to hide some of these options:

Agent-specific notification adapters

A new notification-adapter mechanism enables agent-specific logic to preprocess notifications before handing back to agent-agnostic handling, starting with a Cursor notification adapter (#702 by @aburtsev).

Narrow to block

M-x agent-shell-narrow-to-block narrows the buffer to the most recent N blocks (defaulting to 1), handy for focusing on the latest exchange (#672 by @arthurgleckler).

Keeping the system awake while busy

To keep a long agent turn from being cut short by idle sleep, agent-shell now keeps the system awake while an agent is busy, releasing it as soon as the turn finishes (the display may still blank). It won't override a hard sleep such as closing a laptop lid. This needs the system-sleep library (Emacs 31.1+) and can be disabled via agent-shell-inhibit-system-sleep. Thanks to @shipmints for proposing the idea.

Artist support

M-x agent-shell-artist-insert-text-drawing lets you sketch simple text drawings to drop into a prompt. Check out Bending Emacs episode 14 for a demo, crafting iOS UI.

New third-party packages

The agent-shell package family keeps expanding. Recent additions:

  • agent-shell-math-renderer: Render LaTeX math equations as SVGs in agent-shell.
  • agent-shell-dashboard: A landing page for agent-shell.
  • agent-shell-links.el: Bookmarks and Org links for agent-shell sessions.
  • agent-shell-desktop: Desktop save mode integration, resuming shells by folder, config, and session id.

Maintenance and housekeeping

Keeping up with the project requires daily work. Luckily, I'm getting a bit better at time management since my new 24-hour job, so I've been catching up on general project maintenance, delivering bugfixes and feature requests, merging pull requests, and general bookkeeping.

At its most backed-up period, in mid-May, agent-shell's open issues peaked at 75 while pending PRs peaked at 29.

As of today, we are down to 13 open issues and 4 open PRs.

Side note: this chart was generated using the /github-activity skill shared in my emacs-skills repo.

agent-shell needs your support

Vendor-neutral tooling matters, and there are a couple of ways to help keep agent-shell going. Some cost money, others just a click. All are appreciated ;)

agent-shell is just me, an indie dev, while the tools it competes with have well-funded teams behind them. If this project is useful to you, please consider sponsoring the project. And if your employer benefits from your agent-shell use, nudge them to chip in too, they can typically contribute at a scale individuals can't.

GitHub stars for Anthropic credit

Anthropic offers 6 months of free Claude Max 20x for qualifying open-source projects with at least 5,000+ GitHub stars. Starring agent-shell costs nothing and can save me some money, so if you don't mind a couple of clicks, the project can really use another GitHub star.

Pull requests

Thank you to all contributors for these improvements!

  • #629: Write .agent-shell/ to .git/info/exclude instead of .gitignore (@phairoh)
  • #631: Add implementation/support for oh-my-pi (omp) (@tychoish)
  • #632: Render tool call parameters for non-standard tools like MCP calls (@martenlienen)
  • #633: Add GitHub Actions workflow for ERT tests (@phairoh)
  • #634: Update art generated by agent-shell-hermes--ascii-art (@TamsynUlthara)
  • #639: Preserve window position when restarting (@Gleek)
  • #647: Adjust region line counting when ending at the beginning of a line (@bcc32)
  • #648: Don't italicize intraword underscores (@liaowang11)
  • #651: Post test results on fork PRs (@phairoh)
  • #652: Fix file paths in README for model registration (@vellvisher)
  • #653: Add a reference to agent-shell-desktop.el (@timfel)
  • #656: Fix previous-item skipping the current fragment's heading (@liaowang11)
  • #658: Fix viewport previous-page navigation and stale position label (@liaowang11)
  • #659: Use native ERT JUnit reporting in CI (@phairoh)
  • #661: Don't delete temp dir on agent-shell-restart (@arthurgleckler)
  • #664: Fix transcript section heading glued to interrupted agent message (@liaowang11)
  • #665: Don't trigger completion on path separators in file paths (@liaowang11)
  • #666: Preserve viewport edit draft when queued request executes (@liaowang11)
  • #667: Fix markdown rendering for non-streamed bodies (@arthurgleckler)
  • #672: Add agent-shell-narrow-to-block (@arthurgleckler)
  • #676: Render agent image content blocks inline (@melito)
  • #686: Fix command to pull Qwen2.5 model in README (@jcubic)
  • #687: Record session ID and model in transcript header (@alberti42)
  • #693: Fixes for cline agent (@nhojb)
  • #695: Fix unexpected resize of the window header (@jcubic)
  • #696: Strip source-buffer properties from grabbed region context (@liaowang11)
  • #697: Fix agent-shell-send-dwim double-inserting context with prefix arg (@liaowang11)
  • #698: Fix mouse-copy inside formatted text (@jcubic)
  • #702: Add cursor toolcall output adapter (@aburtsev)
  • #707: Add hermes to default agent configs (@eliferrous)
  • #709: Prevent programmatic fragments ending up in undo history (@martinbaillie)
  • #711: Update goose to not require OpenAI key by default (@hoyon)
  • #713: Align embedded-image rendering with link rendering (@alberti42)
  • #715: Fix table column wrapping for CJK text (@ktakahashi74)
  • #716: Fix resuming copilot session (@gnufied)
  • #717: Make the markdown render context available via a public function (@alberti42)
  • #720: Add first-class Grok Build (xAI) ACP support (@eddof13)
  • #721: Fix hidden streamed Markdown headings (@regadas)
  • #727: Fetches the proper Pi logo (@JanJoar)

Liking agent-shell? Would like to see it evolve? Consider sponsoring the effort.

blocks.html_en: Keeping the system awake while busy

sentences.en: Keeping the system awake while busy
sentences.zh: 忙碌时保持系统清醒

blocks.html_en: To keep a long agent turn from being cut short by idle sleep, agent-shell now keeps the system awake while an agent is busy, releasing it as soon as the turn finishes (the display may still blank). It won't override a hard sleep such as closing a laptop lid. This needs the system-sleep library (Emacs 31.1+) and can be disabled via agent-shell-inhibit-system-sleep. Thanks to @shipmints for proposing the idea.

sentences.en: To keep a long agent turn from being cut short by idle sleep, agent-shell now keeps the system awake while an agent is busy, releasing it as soon as the turn finishes (the display may still blank).

sentences.en: It won't override a hard sleep such as closing a laptop lid.
sentences.zh: 它不会覆盖硬睡眠，例如合上笔记本电脑的盖子。

content_html_zh:
July 22, 2026

自 0.55 更新以来已经有一个多月了，但此后已经发布了很多内容。 让我们回顾一下 v0.63 的亮点。

什么是代理壳？

agent-shell 是一种原生 Emacs 模式，用于与由 ACP（代理客户端协议）支持的 AI 代理进行交互。

支持代理

名单还在继续增长。

这次我们获得了两个新代理的支持：

  • Oh My Pi (omp)，#631，作者：@tychoish。
  • Grok 构建 (xAI)，#720，作者：@eddof13。

此外：

  • Claude 重新获得渲染思维输出，因为其 ACP 服务器默认开始忽略。
  • Cursor 现在在官方 Cursor CLI（代理 acp）上运行。 请注意，需要最新的 CLI，因为 acp 子命令是在 2026 年才添加的。
  • Codex 现在使用 @agentclientprotocol/codex-acp。
  • Cline 现在通过 defcustoms 接受默认模型和会话模式（#693 by @nhojb）。
  • 默认情况下，Goose 不再需要 OpenAI 密钥（@hoyon 的 #711）。
  • Qwen 现在明确支持 OpenAI 兼容密钥。

首选代理

agent-shell-preferred-agent-config 获得了对代理选择的更好控制。 设置为代理标识符以完全跳过选择器，或将其包装以保持选择器具有预选的默认值：

  • (setq agent-shell-preferred-agent-config 'claude-code) 总是启动 Claude，没有提示。
  • (setq agent-shell-preferred-agent-config '(预选 . claude-code)) 保留选择器，但预选 Claude 作为默认值。

自定义 Markdown 渲染器

0.55 中引入的新 Markdown 渲染器现在是可扩展的。 第三方包可以通过 agent-shell-markdown-render-functions 声明并呈现特定的 markdown 结构（源代码块、内联代码范围等）。

感谢 Andrea Alberti 推动了 agent-shell-math-renderer 中的首次集成，它将 LaTeX 数学方程渲染为 SVG。

代理壳面

如果您希望对 agent-shell 缓冲区进行更多主题控制，现在可以通过 agent-shell-faces.el 实现。 此外，请查看 agent-shell-markdown.el 了解 Markdown 主题。

少一点闲聊，多一点分组

如果您的代理会话需要使用大量工具（相当典型），您可能会注意到 shell 输出相当冗长或啰嗦。 这可能会让人分心，因此从现在开始，工具的使用和思考都被分组在“活动”部分（默认情况下折叠）下。 如果您喜欢聊天输出，请不用担心。 使用agent-shell-activity-group-expand-by-default默认扩展批次。

新的“活动”部分具有可自定义的标题（通过agent-shell-activity-group-header-label-function）。 您现在可以通过三种方式呈现活动标题：

描述性的

倒塌

扩展

(setq agent-shell-activity-group-header-label-function
      #'agent-shell-activity-group-descriptive-label)

Count

倒塌

扩展

(setq agent-shell-activity-group-header-label-function
      #'agent-shell-activity-group-count-label)

Tally

倒塌

扩展

(setq agent-shell-activity-group-header-label-function
      #'agent-shell-activity-group-tally-label)

内嵌图像和丰富内容渲染

agent-shell 现在可以内联渲染代理提供的图像内容，无论是 base64 编码、远程 URL 还是资源链接/资源内容块（#676 by @melito）。 音频和其他二进制资源现在呈现为可以从外部打开的链接。

每个代理 MCP 服务器

现在，您可以按照 #593 中的要求，使用 :mcp-servers 字段通过其配置附加每种代理类型的 MCP 服务器。

差异改进

章节标题现在总结了添加和删除的行。

此外，在 diff 缓冲区中按 RET 会跳转到将应用更改的文件位置，同时现在支持多 diff 权限请求。

改进了不按顺序处理

某些代理会在通常的提示会话请求/响应轮次之外发出通知。 从历史上看，这些已被代理外壳删除。 这些不按顺序的通知现在应该按预期呈现。 如果您仍然遇到问题，请提交错误。

新的复制命令

一些用于从 shell 缓冲区中抓取隐藏内容的新命令：

  • M-x agent-shell-copy-as-markdown 将缓冲区文本复制为 markdown。
  • M-x agent-shell-copy-source-block-at-point 复制该点的源块。
  • M-x agent-shell-copy-link-url-at-point 复制该点链接的 URL。

视口调整

视口进行了一些改进：

  • 发送后，agent-shell-viewport-dismiss-on-send 会关闭视口。
  • 通过 C-u C-c C-c 提交提示现在使您能够继续对其他请求进行排队。
  • 历史导航现在会保留您正在进行的提示。

会话选择

新的 agent-shell-session-choices-function 允许您自定义启动新 shell 时显示的选项。 如果您想隐藏其中一些选项，这非常有用：

特定于代理的通知适配器

新的通知适配器机制使特定于代理的逻辑能够在返回到与代理无关的处理之前预处理通知，从游标通知适配器开始（#702 by @aburtsev）。

缩小到阻止

M-x agent-shell-narrow-to-block 将缓冲区缩小到最近的 N 个块（默认为 1），方便关注最新的交换（#672 by @arthurgleckler）。

忙碌时保持系统清醒

为了防止长时间的座席轮流因空闲睡眠而缩短，现在，agent-shell 在座席忙碌时使系统保持唤醒状态，并在轮流结束后立即释放系统（显示屏可能仍为空白）。 它不会覆盖硬睡眠，例如合上笔记本电脑的盖子。 这需要 system-sleep 库 (Emacs 31.1+)，并且可以通过 agent-shell-inhibit-system-sleep 禁用。 感谢@shipmints 提出这个想法。

艺术家支持

M-x agent-shell-artist-insert-text-drawing 允许您绘制简单的文本图画以放入提示中。 查看 Bending Emacs 第 14 集，了解制作 iOS UI 的演示。

新的第三方软件包

agent-shell 包家族不断扩大。 最近添加：

  • agent-shell-math-renderer：在 agent-shell 中将 LaTeX 数学方程渲染为 SVG。
  • agent-shell-dashboard：agent-shell 的登陆页面。
  • agent-shell-links.el：代理 shell 会话的书签和组织链接。
  • agent-shell-desktop：桌面保存模式集成，按文件夹、配置和会话 ID 恢复 shell。

维护和内务管理

跟上项目需要日常工作。 幸运的是，自从我开始 24 小时工作以来，我在时间管理方面有了一些进步，所以我一直在赶上一般项目维护、提供错误修复和功能请求、合并拉取请求以及一般簿记。

在 5 月中旬最受支持的时期，agent-shell 的未决问题达到 75 个峰值，而待决 PR 达到 29 个峰值。

截至今天，我们已减少到 13 个未解决的问题和 4 个未解决的 PR。

旁注：此图表是使用我的 emacs-skills 存储库中共享的 /github-activity 技能生成的。

Agent-Shell 需要您的支持

供应商中立的工具很重要，有几种方法可以帮助保持代理外壳的运行。 有些需要花钱，有些则只需点击一下即可。 所有人都表示赞赏；）

agent-shell 只有我一个独立开发者，而它的竞争工具背后都有资金雄厚的团队。 如果这个项目对您有用，请考虑赞助该项目。 如果你的雇主从你的代理壳的使用中受益，推动他们也参与进来，他们通常可以做出个人无法做到的贡献。

GitHub 因人类信用而获得星星

Anthropic 为具有至少 5,000 多个 GitHub star 的合格开源项目提供 6 个月的免费 Claude Max 20x。 给agent-shell加注星不需要任何成本，而且可以为我节省一些钱，所以如果你不介意点击几下，这个项目真的可以使用另一个GitHub星。

拉取请求
